nasb.text: And Jesus said to them, “Have you come out with swords and clubs to arrest Me, as you would against a robber?

esv.text: And Jesus said to them, “Have you come out as against a robber, with swords and clubs to capture me?

cnv.text: 耶穌對他們說：“你們帶著刀棒出來，把我當作強盜捉拿嗎？

ccb.text: 耶稣问那群人：“你们像对付强盗一样拿着刀棍来抓我吗？

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“你们带着刀剑和棍棒出来抓我，就像对付强盗那样吗？
